heading: Copy of certificate of service
label: 1042 Copy of certificate of service
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)104231:483b., .June 19, 1956, ch. 40970 Stat. 297The words “armed forces” are substituted for “Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, or Coast Guard” because of 10:101(4). The words “honorably or” are added for consistency with 10:1040.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)104231:483b., .June 19, 1956, ch. 40970 Stat. 297The words “armed forces” are substituted for “Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, or Coast Guard” because of 10:101(4). The words “honorably or” are added for consistency with 10:1040.

children.text: a person discharged or released from the armed forces honorably or under honorable conditions;
the next of kin of the person; or
a legal representative of the person.
